hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: A year is a leap year if it is divisible by 4

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: But if the year is also divisible by 100, it is NOT a leap year

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Unless the year is also divisible by 400, in which case it IS a leap year

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Use the remainder operator (%) to check divisibility — if year % 4 equals 0, the year is divisible by 4
